query: SELECT id, name, slug, imageUrl FROM categories WHERE parentId IS NULL AND name IN ('Facebook Accounts','Instagram Accounts','TikTok Accounts & Followers','WhatsApp Accounts','YouTube Accounts & Channels','Twitter/X Accounts','Telegram Accounts','Snapchat Accounts','LinkedIn Accounts','Gmail Accounts','Google Voice Accounts') ORDER BY name;
